title: Venezuelan Cassava Pilaf
description: A traditional Venezuelan side dish made with cassava and pilaf, perfect for accompanying grilled meats.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the pilaf and cook according to package instructions.
Add the grated cassava and stir well to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the icy (chopped ice) to prevent the cassava from browning.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot alongside grilled meats or as a side dish.
